rows.headline: Harbour Point Capital Completes Investment in Midwest Medical Transport
rows.what_it_establishes: Harbour Point Capital states it completed an investment in Midwest Medical Transport in partnership with executive Kevin Ketzel, with prior investors Panorama Point Partners, Dixon Midland Company and ORIX selling their interests in the recapitalization
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: MMT Ambulance Appoints Chris Ciatto as New CEO
rows.what_it_establishes: MMT Ambulance states Chris Ciatto was appointed chief executive officer and board member effective immediately, joining from Phoenix Physical Therapy
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Priority OnDemand welcomes First Call Ambulance to national family of companies
rows.what_it_establishes: Priority OnDemand states First Call Ambulance joined its national family of companies
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Priority Ambulance to Welcome Mississippi-Based LifeCare EMS Team to National Family of Companies as Magnolia Ambulance
rows.what_it_establishes: Priority Ambulance states it is acquiring certain assets of Mississippi-based LifeCare EMS and will operate in seven central Mississippi counties as Magnolia Ambulance, with the transaction set to close January 13, 2025
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Priority OnDemand Announces Key Executive Appointments to Support Accelerated Growth Strategy
rows.what_it_establishes: Priority OnDemand states it made key executive appointments in support of its growth strategy
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Priority Ambulance Launches Sunstate Ambulance in Florida
rows.what_it_establishes: Priority Ambulance states it launched Sunstate Ambulance in Florida
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: First Call Ambulance Receives Extension of Humphreys County 911 Contract
rows.what_it_establishes: Priority Ambulance states its First Call Ambulance operation received an extension of the Humphreys County, Tennessee 911 contract
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Priority Ambulance Names Ray Gayk Pacific Region Regional President
rows.what_it_establishes: Priority Ambulance states Ray Gayk was named Pacific Region regional president
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Blaise Zuschlag promoted to Vice President and Chief Administrative Officer of Acadian Companies
rows.what_it_establishes: Acadian Companies states Blaise Zuschlag was promoted to vice president and chief administrative officer
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Acadian Ambulance to finalize strategic transaction with St. Landry EMS
rows.what_it_establishes: Acadian Ambulance states it agreed to acquire substantially all assets of St. Landry EMS in Louisiana, with closing expected on or before November 30, 2023
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Acadian Ambulance acquires SouthernCross Ambulance
rows.what_it_establishes: Acadian Ambulance states it acquired substantially all assets of New Braunfels, Texas-based SouthernCross Ambulance effective January 15, 2024, adding 12 ambulances, 10 wheelchair vans and 75 employees
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Remembering Richard E. Zuschlag
rows.what_it_establishes: Acadian Companies states its founder, chairman and CEO Richard E. Zuschlag died on June 5, 2024
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Acadian Companies Announces Leadership Transition in Human Resources
rows.what_it_establishes: Acadian Companies states Joe Lightfoot retired as vice president of human resources after 25 years, with Krista Gravouia moving into the role and Allyson Duck becoming director of human resources
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Acadian Ambulance to provide additional EMS support to the City of Houston
rows.what_it_establishes: Acadian Ambulance states it will provide additional EMS support to the City of Houston
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Global Medical Response Solidifies Leadership in EMS with Strategic Refinancing
rows.what_it_establishes: Global Medical Response states it completed a $5.4 billion refinancing, including a $3.6 billion term loan B and $1.0 billion of senior notes
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: GMR Solutions Inc. Announces Launch of its Initial Public Offering
rows.what_it_establishes: Global Medical Response states GMR Solutions Inc. launched an initial public offering of approximately 31.9 million shares of Class A common stock, with a planned NYSE listing under ticker GMRS
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: GMR Solutions Inc. Announces Pricing of its Initial Public Offering
rows.what_it_establishes: Global Medical Response states GMR Solutions Inc. priced an initial public offering of 31,914,893 shares of Class A common stock for NYSE trading under ticker GMRS
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Global Medical Response + Avel eCare Partner to Reimagine 911 Access for Rural America
rows.what_it_establishes: Global Medical Response states it formed a partnership with Avel eCare to launch 911 REACT, described as an integrated 911-to-clinical-care access model for rural America
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Falck generated strong revenue growth but lower earnings in Q1 2022
rows.what_it_establishes: Falck states Q1 2022 Emergency Health and Safety revenue increased due in part to its new ambulance contract in San Diego and generally higher activity in its US ambulance business
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: New directors for Scandinavia and Europe join Falck's Group Executive Management
rows.what_it_establishes: Falck states new directors for Scandinavia and Europe joined its Group Executive Management
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Falck appoints Catalina Giraldo Head of Region Latam
rows.what_it_establishes: Falck states it appointed Catalina Giraldo as Head of Region Latam
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Motion Acquisition Corp. and DocGo Announce Closing of Business Combination, will Begin Trading on Nasdaq Under the Symbol "DCGO"
rows.what_it_establishes: Motion Acquisition Corp. and DocGo state their business combination closed, raising approximately $158 million, with DocGo common stock to begin Nasdaq trading as DCGO on November 8, 2021
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: DocGo Appoints Lee Bienstock as Chief Executive Officer
rows.what_it_establishes: DocGo states its board appointed Lee Bienstock, previously president and chief operating officer, as chief executive officer effective September 15, 2023
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: DocGo Acquires PTI Health To Expand Proactive Healthcare Offering with Mobile Lab Collection and Mobile Phlebotomy Services
rows.what_it_establishes: DocGo states it acquired PTI Health, a mid-Atlantic mobile lab collection and phlebotomy services company, with PTI Health president Wayne Meadows joining DocGo
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: DocGo Acquires Virtual Care Platform SteadyMD, Expands Telehealth Services Across all 50 States
rows.what_it_establishes: DocGo states it acquired virtual care platform SteadyMD, Inc., with SteadyMD co-founders Guy Friedman and Yarone Goren joining DocGo's leadership team
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Beaumont Health signs definitive agreement to sell ambulance division to Superior Air Ground Ambulance Service, Inc.
rows.what_it_establishes: Beaumont Health states it signed a definitive agreement to sell its ambulance division, including Community Emergency Medical Service, Parastar and Beaumont Mobile Medicine, to Superior Air-Ground Ambulance Service, with about 500 employees transitioning
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Beaumont Health sells ambulance division to Superior Air-Ground Ambulance Service of Michigan, Inc.
rows.what_it_establishes: Beaumont Health states it sold its ambulance division to Superior Air-Ground Ambulance Service of Michigan following Michigan Attorney General approval, with closing expected in mid-December 2020
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Oakton and Superior Ambulance Launch "Earn While You Learn" Partnership During National EMS Week
rows.what_it_establishes: Superior Air-Ground Ambulance states it launched an 'Earn While You Learn' EMT training partnership with Oakton College
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Superior Ambulance Awarded Wisconsin Fast Forward Grant
rows.what_it_establishes: Superior Air-Ground Ambulance states it was awarded a $287,690 Wisconsin Fast Forward grant
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: 10 Years with Donor Network West: A Legacy of Compassion
rows.what_it_establishes: Royal Ambulance states it marked ten years of partnership with Donor Network West
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Working Side by Side with Berkeley Fire
rows.what_it_establishes: Royal Ambulance states it operates a dedicated BLS unit embedded within Berkeley's 911 system focused on psychiatric transports
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Royal Ambulance Named a Best Place to Work in EMS - 5th Year Running
rows.what_it_establishes: Royal Ambulance states it ranked No. 6 on the 2026 Inspiring Workplaces Top 100 in North America, its fifth consecutive year on the list
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: Allina Health Names MedSpeed as Partner to Provide System-wide Healthcare Logistics
rows.what_it_establishes: MedSpeed states Allina Health named MedSpeed to provide system-wide healthcare logistics
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: MedSpeed Promotes Wesley Crampton to President
rows.what_it_establishes: MedSpeed states it promoted Wesley Crampton to president
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: MedSpeed Promotes Matt Gutwein to COO
rows.what_it_establishes: MedSpeed states it promoted Matt Gutwein to chief operating officer
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: MedSpeed Announces Partnership with Strategic Health Care Investor
rows.what_it_establishes: MedSpeed states it partnered with strategic health care investor Water Street Healthcare Partners, which committed capital and resources to expand MedSpeed's services
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: WakeMed Selects MedSpeed to Build Integrated Logistics Network
rows.what_it_establishes: MedSpeed states WakeMed selected MedSpeed to build an integrated logistics network
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: TriCore Renews Contract with MedSpeed
rows.what_it_establishes: MedSpeed states TriCore renewed its contract with MedSpeed
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

rows.headline: MedSpeed Appoints Ross Lieb as Chief Financial Officer
rows.what_it_establishes: MedSpeed states it appointed Ross Lieb as chief financial officer
rows.label: PUBLIC-WEB self-claim

notes_per_org.Midwest Medical Transport Company (MMT A: Current domain finding: historical domain midwestmedtrans.com no longer resolves (DNS ENOTFOUND); the company now operates as MMT Ambulance at mmtamb.com (Midwest Medical Transport Company, LLC dba MMT Ambulance, Harbour Point Capital portfolio company; mmtamb.com/about-us confirms 35+ years of patient ambulance transportation). mmtamb.com has NO news/press section (mmtamb.com/news/ returns 404; Yoast sitemap lists only page- and team-sitemaps). Dated self-issued releases were found on businesswire.com and mirrored on owner Harbour Point Capital's newsroom (harbourpointcapital.com/news/, which carries only two MMT items: the Jan 2022 investment and the Apr 2023 CEO appointment). PitchBook indicates a March 4, 2025 acquisition of North State Medical Transport (nsmt.biz presents itself as 'an MMT Ambulance company') and an MMT LinkedIn post references a Med Tech Ambulance (Omaha) expansion, but no dated press release could be located for either, so no rows were recorded for them. web.archive.org lookups for the old domain were blocked by this environment's egress policy.
notes_per_org.Priority Ambulance: Newsroom used: https://priorityambulance.com/newsroom/ (dates from newsroom listing and article page metadata). No Nebraska/Iowa/Kansas/Missouri items found on the site.
notes_per_org.Acadian Ambulance / Acadian Companies: Newsroom used: https://acadian.com/news/ (dates from individual release pages; listing is heavy on employee-recognition items).
notes_per_org.AMR / Global Medical Response: Newsroom used: https://www.globalmedicalresponse.com/about/news (year/category filters; dates verified on individual release pages). No Nebraska/Iowa/Kansas/Missouri company releases identified in the Company Release category.
notes_per_org.Falck US / Falck: Newsrooms tried: press.falck.com/pressreleases and press.falck.com/pressreleases/falck-wins-emergency-ambulance-contract-in-san-diego-3112649 returned HTTP 503 repeatedly (bot protection); direct curl failed TLS handshake. falck.com/news/ loads, but several article pages returned intermittent HTTP 500 (strong-annual-results-in-falck-in-2021, falck-invests-and-maintains-operating-profit), so the San Diego contract-win release and the Boulder, CO commencement / Alameda, CA extension items could not be date-verified from their own pages and were omitted. Rows use falck.com/news/latest-news pages that loaded with visible dates.
notes_per_org.DocGo: Newsrooms used: ir.docgo.com (public company IR; JS-heavy list) and docgo.com/press/. Row dates verified on Business Wire/PR Newswire release pages and docgo.com/press release page; PTI Health day-of-month corroborated by the Business Wire release URL datestamp (20250210) and DocGo's own press listing (February 2025).
notes_per_org.Superior Air-Ground Ambulance: Superior's own site (superiorambulance.com/news/ redirecting to its blog) is mostly EMT-class and community items, largely undated in the listing; dates taken from article page metadata. The 2020 ambulance-division transaction rows are from the counterparty Beaumont Health's newsroom (newsroom.corewellhealth.org), the only dated public releases found for that transaction.
notes_per_org.Royal Ambulance: Newsroom used: https://www.royalambulance.com/blog (blog format, no formal press-release archive; dates from page JSON-LD datePublished). Content is largely culture/recognition; the three most announcement-like dated posts were recorded.
notes_per_org.MedSpeed: Newsroom used: https://www.medspeed.com/news/ (listing shows no dates; dates taken from each article page's article:published_time metadata).
